hero.subtitle: Your cameras already capture everything that matters. AI Vision turns that footage into real-time operational intelligence — so you know what's happening, and what to do next.

problem.title: You Have Cameras. But Not Operational Visibility.

items.title: Cameras Record, But Don’t Explain
items.description: Your cameras collect thousands of hours of footage, but managers still have to watch and search manually to find what matters.

items.title: Managers Discover Problems Too Late
items.description: Overloads, delays, unstaffed zones and safety incidents are only discovered after the damage has already been done.

items.title: Operational Data Is Fragmented
items.description: Video, business systems and reports aren’t connected into a single clear picture of what’s happening.

howItWorks.title: From Live Video to Actionable Decisions.

footer.tagline: Turn every camera into operational intelligence — real-time insights, alerts and answers from what's happening on the ground.

productPreview.question: What happened near loading bay 3 this morning?
productPreview.answer: Between 08:14 and 08:27, three delivery vehicles arrived. One vehicle remained idle for 11 minutes and caused a loading delay.

about.title: Built for the People Who Run Operations.
about.subtitle: We started Vysiq AI because operations teams had cameras everywhere and visibility nowhere. Our mission is to turn the video you already have into real-time operational intelligence — so you know what's happening on the ground, even when you're not there.
about.missionBody1a: Cameras record everything and explain nothing. Managers are left watching footage after the fact, piecing together what went wrong from fragments of video, spreadsheets and reports that were never connected in the first place.
about.missionBody1b: We believe the cameras already on site are enough — what's missing is the layer that understands what they see and turns it into something a manager can act on in the moment.
about.missionBody2a: Vysiq AI connects to existing camera infrastructure and turns live video into detected events, operational context, and answers to plain-language questions — built for retail, warehouses, manufacturing, construction and hospitality teams.
about.missionBody2b: It's designed to feel like an operations tool first, and an AI product second.

values.title: Works With What You Have
values.description: We connect to the cameras already installed on site — no rip-and-replace, no new hardware.

values.title: Operational, Not Just AI
values.description: Every feature is built around a real operational question, not a model demo.

values.title: Privacy By Design
values.description: No facial recognition by default, configurable retention, and privacy zones built in from day one.

values.title: Built With Operators
values.description: Every capability is shaped alongside the managers and teams who run physical operations daily.

blog.title: Insights on Operational Intelligence.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question about Vysiq AI or want to see the platform in action? Send us a message and our team will get back to you.

overview.heading: Overview
overview.body: Vysiq AI ("we", "us", "our") provides an operational intelligence platform that turns camera footage into real-time insights. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have.

collect.heading: Information We Collect
items: Account information you provide, such as name, email, and company details.
Video and sensor data from cameras connected to the platform by your organization.
Usage data, including how you interact with the dashboard and AI assistant.

use.heading: How We Use Information
use.body: We use collected information to operate and improve the platform, generate detections and alerts, provide customer support, and maintain the security of our systems.

retention.heading: Data Retention
retention.body: Video and derived data are retained according to the retention settings configured by your organization. You can request deletion of your account data at any time.

sharing.heading: Sharing
sharing.body: We do not sell your data. We may share data with subprocessors who help us deliver the platform, subject to confidentiality obligations, or as required by law.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: Questions about this policy can be sent to <1>{{email}}</1>.

agreement.heading: Agreement to Terms
agreement.body: By accessing or using the Vysiq AI platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the platform.

use.heading: Use of the Platform
use.body: You may use the platform only for lawful operational monitoring purposes and in accordance with any agreement between your organization and Vysiq AI. You are responsible for ensuring your use of camera footage complies with applicable law, including notifying individuals as required.

accounts.heading: Accounts
accounts.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account.

availability.heading: Availability
availability.body: We aim to keep the platform available and reliable but do not guarantee uninterrupted access. Scheduled maintenance and unforeseen outages may occur.

liability.heading: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Vysiq AI is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of the platform.

changes.heading: Changes to These Terms
changes.body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the platform after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: Questions about these terms can be sent to <1>{{email}}</1>.
